name: Spotify Downloader
overview: Download Spotify playlists and import YouTube videos directly into your Jellyfin library
description: A Jellyfin plugin that integrates with a Python backend to download Spotify playlists and YouTube videos. Supports playlist management, library selection, and automatic metadata tagging.
releaseNotes: Initial release with Jellyfin plugin integration
User-facing import page with playlist and library selection
Admin configuration page for backend setup
Support for YouTube video import and Spotify playlist downloads

changelog.description: Initial release with full Jellyfin plugin support, user interface, library selection, and admin configuration
